title: Weather
explanation:
Weather

  • nouns: forecast, storm, lightning, breeze, humidity
  • adjectives: cloudy, foggy, mild, freezing, boiling
  • verbs: pour, clear up, brighten up

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: It's ____ — I can hardly see the road. | *foggy | mild | breeze
The weather ____ says it will rain tomorrow. | *forecast | storm | lightning
It's ____ outside — wear a warm coat. | *freezing | boiling | mild
It started to ____ — rain was falling heavily. | *pour | clear | brighten

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: There was ____ during the night. | thunder
It's a bit ____ today — not too hot, not too cold. | mild
The sky is grey and ____. | cloudy
I hope the weather ____ later. | clear up
We saw ____ in the distance. | lightning

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: A light ____ made the heat easier. | *breeze | storm | humidity
The ____ is very high — it feels sticky. | *humidity | forecast | thunder
A big ____ is coming from the west. | *storm | breeze | mild
